personal.name: Ashwani Kumar
personal.title: Senior Full Stack Engineer
personal.bio: Senior Full Stack Engineer with 10+ years of expertise in crafting resilient web architectures, highly-scalable backend microservices, and slick, responsive frontends. Specialized in Node.js, React, Angular, AWS, and distributed database tuning.

highlights: Architected and delivered custom enterprise solutions for multi-tenant SaaS clients globally, leveraging Next.js, Node.js, and Serverless AWS frameworks.
Engineered 'motomate', an on-demand fleet-servicing application which reduced dispatch latency by 35% using geohashing and WebSockets.
Tuned heavy database architectures to support up to 5,000 requests per second, achieving a 45% reduction in PostgreSQL CPU consumption via aggressive query analysis and Redis buffering.
Vetted and collaborated with elite engineering talent worldwide to build robust server architectures for high-growth US startups.
Refactored complex state management layers in legacy Angular systems to modern reactive patterns, leading to 50% faster UI paint speeds.
Created scalable third-party APIs using NestJS and unified authentication filters using JSON Web Tokens and Redis-backed session revoking.
Promoted rapidly from Assistant Systems Engineer to Lead Systems Engineer owing to strong execution of banking compliance architectures.
Headed a team of 6 developers in designing a real-time risk mitigation and transaction monitoring pipeline for global financial clients, reducing fraudulent alert overhead by 22%.
Pioneered the adoption of TypeScript and clean architecture principles within the branch division, conducting workshops and drafting strict lint rules.

projects.name: MotoMate
projects.description: On-demand fleet servicing and mechanics dispatch portal.
projects.architecture: Next.js frontend, Express backend microservices, Redis PubSub geohash dispatcher, PostgreSQL primary database.
projects.challenges: Resolving mechanics dispatching races under sudden peak hour demands without dropping websocket connections.
projects.learnings: Utilizing Redis Lua scripting to handle atomic token bucket checking and mechanic allocation locks.

projects.name: Risk Mitigation Engine
projects.description: Real-time compliance audit and fraudulent transaction monitoring platform.
projects.architecture: Event-driven architecture with Kafka streams, NestJS transaction validator, and PostgreSQL cold storage.
projects.challenges: Ingesting and scoring financial ledger streams with less than 20ms of total validation overhead.
projects.learnings: Implementing zero-allocation serialization templates and optimized bulk indexes on compound PostgreSQL keys.

projects.name: TradeSync Telegram Bot
projects.description: Scalable trading automation, technical alert parser, and Web3 asset tracking bot.
projects.architecture: Node.js cluster worker architecture, Telegraf library, SQLite fast transactional logging, and third-party Web3 JSON-RPC proxies.
projects.challenges: Handling high-concurrency channel Webhooks during intense market volatility without dropping execution requests.
projects.learnings: Implementing an in-memory priority queue using Redis to process transactions in batch orders with automated sliding-window rate limit backoffs.

projects.name: Dynamic Price Surge Engine
projects.description: Surge pricing and demand-supply modeling algorithm for ride-sharing platforms.
projects.architecture: FastAPI calculation engine, Redis memory-grid for surge maps, and visual React dashboard.
projects.challenges: Recalculating local polygon pricing tiers on-the-fly as user coordinate densities shift.
projects.learnings: Leveraging Uber's H3 spatial index system to group geo-coordinates into hexagonal grids, performing instant O(1) adjacency calculations in Redis.

projects.name: LexSphere Practice Suite
projects.description: Legal practice case management, automated document assembly, and structured hourly invoicing application.
projects.architecture: Monolithic Express App, React UI, AWS S3 document vaults, and Stripe API billing gateway.
projects.challenges: Securing sensitive legal drafts while allowing multi-tenant lawyers to generate and edit files dynamically in-browser.
projects.learnings: Implementing AWS S3 Pre-signed URLs for secure direct-upload, coupled with strict Row Level Security (RLS) policies on PostgreSQL.

projects.name: EchoPulse Review Hub
projects.description: Corporate 360 review, performance logging, and team sentiment feedback tracker.
projects.architecture: React Client, Node.js API, MongoDB document storage, and HuggingFace sentiment API integration.
projects.challenges: Anonymizing sensitive peer-reviews while generating rich aggregate performance analytics for managers.
projects.learnings: Utilizing dynamic data hashing and k-anonymity checks to block manager-level identification of individual team responses.

articles.title: Building a High-Throughput Event Bus with Redis Streams
articles.summary: Redis is often overlooked for persistent messaging. Here's how to build a reliable event bus that guarantees at-least-once delivery with consumer groups.

articles.title: Advanced Change Detection and Zone.js Optimization in Angular
articles.summary: Deep dive into Zone.js, the Ivy renderer, and how to surgically run operations outside Angular's core check loop to unlock flawless 60fps animations.

articles.title: Maximizing Email Deliverability: DKIM, SPF, and AWS SES Tuning
articles.summary: Emails landing in spam? Learn how to configure modern DNS records, handle bounces via SNS, and configure AWS SES to maintain a perfect sender reputation.
